local_dishes.name: Kerala Sadya
local_dishes.description: Quintessential Kerala meal - lavish spread of vegetarian dishes served on banana leaf including rice, various curries, pickles, and desserts
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf

local_dishes.name: Appam and Stew
local_dishes.description: Rice pancake with soft, spongy centre and crispy edges, perfect for dipping in mild coconut stew
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf

local_dishes.name: Puttu and Kadala Curry
local_dishes.description: Steamed rice cylinders served with spicy black chickpea curry - popular breakfast item
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf

local_dishes.name: Banana Chips
local_dishes.description: Crispy and slightly sweet banana chips - popular snack
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf

local_dishes.name: Thalassery Biryani
local_dishes.description: Popular variant of biryani known for fragrant rice and rich, flavourful spices
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf

local_dishes.name: Ghee Roast Dosa
local_dishes.description: Crispy and buttery dosa with rich ghee flavour, served with coconut chutney and sambar
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf

local_dishes.name: Bonda
local_dishes.description: Deep-fried snacks with crispy outer layer and soft, spicy filling - popular tea-time treat
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf

local_dishes.name: Kozhikodan Halwa
local_dishes.description: Sweet treat made from wheat flavoured with ghee and cardamom
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf

local_dishes.name: Payasam
local_dishes.description: Delicious rice or vermicelli pudding flavoured with cardamom and garnished with cashews and raisins
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf

local_dishes.name: Kattan Chaya
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Consider an international roaming plan or a local SIM card upon arrival
connectivity_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf

health_tips.tip: Carry prescription medicines and travel insurance
health_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/All Inclusive Guide- Kerala.pdf

health_tips.tip: Use mosquito/insect repellent due to tropical climate
